svg.text: Recommended stack — Next.js monorepo on local server

g.text: Browser (HR, IT, Admin users on company intranet)
Next.js application server — single codebase, single deployment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What pages does the HR module need?')
sendPrompt('What pages does the IT module need?')
sendPrompt('What should the admin dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What shared UI components does this project need?')
sendPrompt('How does authentication and role-based access work in Next.js?')
sendPrompt('What API routes does the employee module need?')
sendPrompt('What API routes does the asset module need?')
sendPrompt('What API routes does the provisioning module need?')
sendPrompt('What API routes does the email module need?')
sendPrompt('How should the audit log API work?')

g.text: Prisma ORM — type-safe DB access, migrations, query builder
schema.prisma defines all 10 tables · auto-generates TypeScript types · handles migrations
PostgreSQL database — runs on same local server
All 10 tables · indexes · enum types · audit log
IT alerts · provision complete · warranty expiry
